title: Error logs for a service
description: Retrieve error-level log lines for a specific application in a given namespace

title: Exception / stack trace logs
description: Find logs containing exceptions or stack traces for a service

title: HTTP 5xx errors from a service
description: Show HTTP 500-range error responses logged by a service

title: All logs for a namespace (last hour)
description: Tail all log lines across every pod in a Kubernetes namespace

title: OOMKilled events in a namespace
description: Detect out-of-memory kills recorded in Kubernetes events or container logs

title: CrashLoopBackOff events
description: Find Kubernetes pod crash-loop events in the cluster event log

title: Slow database queries
description: Find log lines reporting slow or long-running database queries

title: Database connection errors
description: Detect database connection failures or pool exhaustion in service logs
template: {app="{{app}}", namespace="{{namespace}}"} |~ "(?i)(connection refused|connection reset|too many connections|pool exhausted)"

title: Pod CPU usage
description: Current CPU usage as a fraction of the requested CPU for a pod or service

title: Pod memory usage
description: Current working set memory in bytes for pods matching a service name

title: HTTP request rate
description: Per-second HTTP request throughput for a service over the last 5 minutes

title: HTTP error rate (5xx)
description: Fraction of HTTP requests returning 5xx status codes for a service

title: Request latency p99
description: 99th-percentile HTTP request duration for a service

title: Pod restart count
description: Number of container restarts for pods in a namespace, sorted descending

title: Node CPU saturation
description: CPU usage across all cluster nodes as a percentage of total capacity

title: Node memory pressure
description: Available memory on each node as a percentage of total RAM
